name: Aya Gold & Silver Inc.
summary: Aya Gold & Silver Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, exploration, evaluation, and development of precious metal properties in Morocco. The company explores for gold, silver, zinc, lead, tungsten, molybdenum, uranium, and copper deposits. Its flagship project is the Zgounder property located in the Proterozoic Siroua Massif of the Anti-Atlas Range, Morocco. The company was formerly known as Maya Gold and Silver Inc. and changed its name to Aya Gold & Silver Inc. in July 2020. Aya Gold & Silver Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
